A.description: Synthetic diagnosis maps to SYN-DX-001 with synthetic=True

B.description: Unknown entity unmapped, codes=[], no hallucinated code

C.description: Local lookup maps synthetic SNOMED-like code, synthetic=True, version=test-only

D.description: Ambiguous local lookup returns ambiguous, no unsafe preferred_code

E.description: Missing lookup file → coding_unavailable or source_unavailable, no crash

F.description: Invalid codes rejected: empty code, unknown system, synthetic=False on synthetic system

G.description: Active record coded; tier/status unchanged; medical_coding ledger event written

H.description: Hypothesis record coded; tier=hypothesis preserved; no promotion

I.description: Medication record with DDI blocked: coding applied, DDI status unchanged, no safety clearance implied

J.description: Enrichment candidate coded after hypothesis write; AI-derived fact stays hypothesis

K.description: Privacy audit: no raw PHI/path/secret in public report
